title: selago polygala
intro: Selago polygala, also known as Blue-daisy or Blue-flower, is a flowering plant species in the genus Selago, native to the mountains of the Cape Provinces in South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Selago polygala include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Selago polygala include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
